Happy first week of Winter 2026 🎉🎉 Looking to make the most out of the term?

Volunteer with MathSoc to gain valuable experience, meet new people, or boost your resume for the upcoming recruiting season. Whether you want to organize events, create content, or help fellow students—MathSoc has volunteer roles for everyone 🔥🔥 

Open to all Math students (first years are especially encouraged 🤭) 

Applications are welcome anytime, but applying ASAP is preferred! 

Link for application in bio

Math C&D is Hiring Cashiers! 🛒☕

Looking for a job on campus? Math C&D is hiring cashiers! Positions are open to all undergraduate students.

📅 Deadline to apply: April 4th, 2025
📩 Submit your resume and Spring 2025 class schedule to rpenner@mathsoc.uwaterloo.ca

Join the team and be part of the Math C&D community! 🚀 #MathSoc #Hiring #CampusJobs
